name: Will I lose my job if I file for breathing problems from work dust?
description: No—Utah bans retaliation; report violations for protection.[1]

mainEntity.name: Will I lose my job if I file for breathing problems from work dust?

acceptedAnswer.text: No—Utah bans retaliation; report violations for protection.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Utah law prohibits retaliation** for filing legitimate workers' comp claims; violations lead to reinstatement, back pay, and penalties.[1]

Employers can't fire or demote you for injury reports, but prove retaliation with timing evidence.[3]

**Key factors:**
- Claim filing date vs. adverse action
- Performance records
- Witness statements

**Practical guidance:** Document all interactions; file retaliation charge if occurs. Lawyer protects you.
Your job is safeguarded.
